items.headline: More Two-Room Flexi BTO Flats Built, But Singles Still Face Crushing Application Rates
items.summary: HDB has been increasing the supply of two-room flexi flats aimed at singles, yet application rates remain stubbornly high. The piece digs into one buyer trend that helps explain why demand is still running well ahead of supply.
items.meaning: Singles applying for a BTO flat should know that more units on paper does not mean shorter queues, especially if everyone is still targeting the same popular towns.
items.body:
HDB has been adding more two-room flexi flats to address demand from singles, who are among the few groups eligible to apply for BTO flats on their own. Despite the higher supply numbers, application rates for these units remain extremely high, meaning the queue is still very long for each available flat.

Part of the reason demand refuses to ease is that buyer behaviour has not shifted much. Singles are still clustering their applications around the same popular towns, so a larger total supply does not translate into shorter queues in the areas people actually want to live in.

For singles in the BTO queue right now, the honest takeaway is this: more flats being built does not automatically improve your chances. If you keep applying to the same high-demand towns as everyone else, your odds stay poor. Spreading your options to less popular towns, or applying across multiple launches, will do more for your chances than waiting for supply to catch up with demand.
items.headline_zh: HDB两房灵活式BTO单位供应增加，但单身申请竞争依旧惨烈
items.summary_zh: HDB一直在增加面向单身人士的两房灵活式组屋供应，但申请率依然居高不下。文章深入分析了一个买家趋势，帮助解释为何需求仍远超供应。
items.meaning_zh: 正在申请BTO的单身人士要了解：单位供应量增加，不等于排队变短，尤其当大家还是挤在同一批热门市镇抢号的时候。
items.body_zh:
HDB一直在增加两房灵活式组屋的供应，以满足单身人士的需求，单身人士是少数几个可以独立申请BTO的群体之一。尽管供应数字有所提升，这类单位的申请率依然极高，意味着每个可用单位的等候队伍仍然很长。

需求迟迟未能缓解，部分原因在于买家行为并没有太大改变。单身申请者还是集中在同一批热门市镇，因此总供应量虽然提高，人们真正想住的地区却并未因此缩短排队。

对于目前正在BTO队伍中等待的单身人士，说实话的结论是：多建几个单位，不代表你的机会自动变大。如果你一直和其他人一样申请同样的热门市镇，中签率还是会很低。把选择拓展到较冷门的市镇，或跨越多个销售推介期申请，对提高胜算来说，远比单纯等待供应追上需求更实际。

items.headline: Dunearn House Launches from $1.475M: First Condo in Bukit Timah Turf City
items.summary: Frasers Property has launched Dunearn House, the first private condo in the Bukit Timah Turf City transformation area, with entry prices starting at $1.475 million and an average of $2,799 per square foot.
items.meaning: If you have been watching the Turf City area, this launch sets the pricing benchmark for the whole precinct and is your first real signal of what homes there will cost.
items.stat_label: average launch price per sq ft
items.body:
Frasers Property has launched Dunearn House, the first private condo to come out of the Bukit Timah Turf City transformation area. Entry prices start at $1.475 million and the project averages $2,799 per square foot across the development.

The Turf City precinct has been on many buyers' radar for years, but until now there was no real pricing data to anchor expectations. Dunearn House changes that. Whatever comes next in the precinct will almost certainly be benchmarked against what Frasers is charging here, so this launch effectively sets the floor for the whole area.

For buyers who have been waiting to see what Turf City homes would cost, you now have your answer. At $2,799 psf with entry around $1.475 million, this is priced at a level that reflects the location's appeal and the long-term redevelopment story. Whether that premium makes sense for you depends on how much confidence you have in how the precinct develops over the next decade.
items.headline_zh: Dunearn House开售，入门价$1.475M起：武吉知马Turf City首个condo
items.summary_zh: Frasers Property推出Dunearn House，这是武吉知马Turf City转型区域的首个私人condo项目，入门价从$1.475 million起，整个项目平均售价为每平方尺$2,799。
items.meaning_zh: 如果你一直在关注Turf City一带，这次开售定下了整个区域的定价基准，也是你第一个真实信号，让你知道那里的房子大概要花多少钱。
items.body_zh:
Frasers Property推出Dunearn House，这是武吉知马Turf City转型区域的首个私人condo项目。入门价从$1.475 million起，整个发展项目的平均尺价为$2,799 psf。

Turf City一带多年来一直是不少买家关注的地区，但在此之前，始终没有真实的定价数据可以作为参考。Dunearn House改变了这一局面。接下来在这个区域推出的项目，几乎肯定会以Frasers这次的定价作为基准，因此这次开售实际上为整个区域定下了价格底线。

对于一直在等着看Turf City房价的买家，现在你有答案了。入门价约$1.475 million、平均$2,799 psf，这个定价反映了该地段的吸引力以及长期重新发展的故事。这个溢价对你是否合理，取决于你对这个区域在未来十年如何发展有多大信心。

items.headline: One of Only 93 Multi-Generation HDB Flats in Bishan Listed for $1.59M
items.summary: A rare dual-key HDB flat in Bishan, part of only 93 multi-generation units in the entire town, has been listed for $1.59 million. These flats allow two households to live under one roof with separate entrances and spaces.
items.meaning: If extended-family living in a single HDB unit appeals to you, be prepared to pay a steep premium and hunt hard, because these almost never come up for sale.
items.body:
A multi-generation HDB flat in Bishan has been listed for $1.59 million, and what makes this unit exceptional is just how rare the flat type is. Across the entire Bishan town, only 93 such units exist. These flats let two family households share one address while keeping separate living spaces and their own entrances.

They were built to solve a specific problem: ageing parents living close to their adult children without either party giving up privacy. Because so few exist and the design genuinely works for that purpose, owners rarely sell. When one does appear on the market, serious interest follows quickly.

For families considering multi-generation living under one HDB roof, the $1.59 million asking price reflects both the scarcity of the flat type and the strength of Bishan as a location. Do not expect much room to negotiate or time to deliberate. These listings move fast, and the next one in Bishan may not surface for years.
items.headline_zh: 碧山全镇仅93个多代同堂HDB单位之一，以$1.59M挂牌求售
items.summary_zh: 碧山一个罕见的双钥匙HDB组屋挂牌出售，叫价$1.59 million。全碧山镇只有93个这类多代同堂单位，这类组屋允许两个家庭在同一屋檐下生活，各有独立入口和空间。
items.meaning_zh: 如果你希望大家庭能在同一个HDB单位里同住，要做好付出高溢价、努力寻找的心理准备，因为这类单位极少出现在市场上。
items.body_zh:
碧山一个多代同堂HDB组屋以$1.59 million挂牌，而这个单位真正特别之处，在于这种户型有多罕见。整个碧山镇，只有93个这样的单位。这类组屋让两个家庭共用同一个地址，同时各自保有独立的生活空间和出入口。

这类单位当年是为了解决一个具体问题而建造的：让年迈父母能够住在成年子女附近，双方又不必牺牲各自的私人空间。正因为数量极少，而且设计确实符合这个用途，业主几乎不会轻易出售。一旦有单位出现在市场上，有诚意的买家很快就会蜂拥而至。

对于有意多代同堂、共住在一个HDB屋顶下的家庭，$1.59 million的叫价既反映了这种户型的稀缺性，也体现了碧山作为地段的价值。不要期望有太多议价空间或慢慢考虑的时间。这类挂牌向来成交很快，碧山下一个同类单位可能要多年后才再次出现。

items.headline: Serangoon Executive HDB Flat Sets New Record at $1.27M
items.summary: An executive HDB flat in Serangoon changed hands for $1.27 million, breaking the area's price record by the thinnest margin. Executive flats are the largest standard HDB type, typically around 1,300 to 1,600 square feet.
items.meaning: Buyers after a large HDB flat in a well-connected mature town should expect to pay increasingly close to seven figures.
items.body:
An executive HDB flat in Serangoon has sold for $1.27 million, narrowly pushing past the previous price record for the area. Executive flats are the largest type in the standard HDB range, typically between 1,300 and 1,600 square feet, and they offer a level of space that is genuinely difficult to match anywhere else at a comparable price in Singapore.

Serangoon is a mature estate with strong MRT connections, well-regarded schools nearby, and plenty of food and retail options close at hand. That combination of size, location, and everyday convenience is what drives buyers to pay prices that would have seemed unimaginable for an HDB flat not so many years ago.

If you are looking for a large HDB flat in a well-connected, established town, the Serangoon record is a signal of where the market is heading. Prices are not leaping dramatically, but each new record erodes the old ceiling. Buyers who need the space of an executive flat and have a firm budget should go in with clear numbers in mind, because waiting tends to cost more than acting.
items.headline_zh: 实龙岗特大型HDB组屋以$1.27M成交，创区域新纪录
items.summary_zh: 实龙岗一个特大型HDB组屋以$1.27 million易手，以极微的差距打破了该区域的价格纪录。特大型组屋是HDB标准户型中面积最大的，通常约为1,300至1,600平方尺。
items.meaning_zh: 有意购买交通便利的成熟市镇大面积HDB组屋的买家，应预期价格越来越接近七位数。
items.stat_label_zh: 实龙岗特大型组屋纪录
items.body_zh:
实龙岗一个特大型HDB组屋以$1.27 million售出，以微弱差距超越了该区域此前的价格纪录。特大型组屋是HDB标准系列中面积最大的户型，通常介于1,300至1,600平方尺之间，能提供在新加坡难以找到同等价格替代品的居住空间。

实龙岗是个成熟市镇，MRT连接方便，附近有口碑不错的学校，餐饮和零售选择也相当丰富。正是这种面积、地段与日常便利的结合，驱使买家愿意以放在几年前绝对不可思议的价格购买HDB组屋。

如果你正在寻找交通方便、配套成熟的大型HDB单位，实龙岗的这个纪录正是市场走向的一个信号。价格没有大幅飙涨，但每次新纪录都在侵蚀旧有的价格上限。需要特大型面积、又有明确预算的买家，入市时最好心中有数，因为观望的代价往往比出手更高。

items.headline: HDB Resale Prices Have Fallen for Two Straight Quarters
items.summary: HDB resale prices dropped for the second consecutive quarter, with one key buyer trend helping explain the slide. It marks a meaningful reversal from the record highs of recent years.
items.meaning: Buyers on the HDB resale market are in a better position than they were a year ago, but prices are easing gradually, not crashing, so do not expect fire-sale deals.
items.body:
HDB resale flat prices have now fallen for two consecutive quarters, a meaningful reversal from the record highs that dominated headlines in recent years. The slide is being driven at least in part by a shift in buyer behaviour that is pulling some demand away from the resale market.

Two quarters of falling prices does not amount to a crash, and anyone holding out for steep discounts is likely to be disappointed. The market is adjusting, not collapsing. Sellers who bought near recent peaks are not panicking, and well-located flats with good remaining lease are still transacting at firm prices.

For buyers, this is a more comfortable environment than it was a year ago. You have a bit more negotiating room and a little less urgency. The practical advice is straightforward: if you find the right flat at a price that fits your finances and timeline, this is a reasonable moment to commit. Waiting for a much sharper fall may mean waiting a very long time.
items.headline_zh: HDB转售价格连续两个季度下滑
items.summary_zh: HDB转售组屋价格连续第二个季度下跌，一个关键的买家趋势有助于解释这次下滑。这标志着近年来历史高位出现了明显的逆转。
items.meaning_zh: 目前在HDB转售市场买房的人处于比一年前更有利的位置，但价格是在缓步回落，而非崩盘，因此不要期待会出现大减价的捡漏机会。
items.body_zh:
HDB转售组屋价格已连续两个季度下跌，与近年来频频登上头条的历史高位相比，这是一次明显的逆转。这次下跌至少部分源于买家行为的转变，令部分需求从转售市场流失。

两个季度的价格下滑并不等于崩盘，任何抱着等待大幅折扣心态的人，很可能会失望而归。市场是在调整，而不是在崩溃。在近期高位买入的卖家并没有恐慌，地段好、租约余期充裕的单位依然以稳定的价格成交。

对买家来说，目前的环境比一年前更为舒适。你有稍多一点的议价空间，少了一点非买不可的紧迫感。实际建议也很简单：如果你找到了合适的单位，价格又符合你的财务状况和时间规划，现在是一个相对合理的出手时机。等待价格大幅回落，可能意味着要等上很长一段时间。

items.headline: Boutique Condo Projects Are More Likely to Have Construction Defects, BCA Finds
items.summary: The Building and Construction Authority found that smaller boutique condo developments have a higher rate of construction quality defects compared to larger projects.
items.meaning: If you are buying a unit in a small boutique condo, do a thorough defect inspection at handover because the statistical odds of finding problems are higher than at a big development.
items.body:
The Building and Construction Authority has found that smaller boutique condo developments have higher rates of construction defects compared to larger projects. This is worth taking seriously if you are buying into a small development, because it reflects a real and measurable difference in build quality outcomes, not just anecdote.

Boutique condos often carry a premium appeal based on exclusivity and a quieter residential feel. But the BCA data suggests the construction process at smaller sites is more prone to quality problems, possibly because large projects have more resources and tighter quality control built into their workflows by necessity.

When you collect your keys from a boutique condo, do not skip the defect inspection or rush through it. Engage a professional inspector if your budget allows. The odds of finding something that needs fixing are meaningfully higher than at a large development, and the developer's defect liability period is your best window to get issues sorted at no cost to you.
items.headline_zh: BCA发现：精品小型condo项目出现建筑缺陷的概率更高
items.summary_zh: 建设局（BCA）发现，较小型的精品condo发展项目，建筑质量缺陷率比大型项目更高。
items.meaning_zh: 如果你正在购买小型精品condo的单位，验收时务必做全面的缺陷检查，因为从统计数据来看，发现问题的概率比大型发展项目更高。
items.body_zh:
建设局（BCA）发现，小型精品condo发展项目的建筑缺陷率，比大型项目更高。如果你正在购买小型发展项目的单位，这一点值得认真对待，因为它反映的是有据可查的施工质量差异，而不仅仅是坊间说法。

精品condo往往以独特性和安静的居住氛围作为卖点，定价也经常偏高。但BCA的数据显示，小型工地的施工过程更容易出现质量问题，原因可能在于大型项目在资源和质量管控方面有更严格的流程要求。

收到精品condo的钥匙时，不要跳过验房环节，也不要草草了事。如果预算允许，建议聘请专业验房师。在这类项目发现需要修缮问题的概率，明显高于大型发展项目，而发展商的缺陷责任期是你免费解决问题的最佳窗口，错过了就要自掏腰包。

items.headline: VIP Condo Previews Under Scrutiny After Agents Get First Pick Before Public Buyers
items.summary: Regulators are examining the common practice of VIP preview sales at new condo launches, where property agents routinely buy or reserve units before the general public even gets a look in.
items.meaning: If you have ever arrived at a launch only to find the best units already sold, this is exactly why, and the rules around it may change soon.
items.body:
Regulators are examining how new condo launches handle VIP previews, a long-standing industry practice where property agents get access to units before the general public does. At many launches, agents not only bring clients during the preview period but also buy units for themselves or reserve the most desirable options well before ordinary buyers get a look in.

This has frustrated public buyers for years. You arrive at a launch genuinely interested in a specific stack or floor level, only to be told those units are already gone. The VIP preview system has effectively created a two-tier market where being connected to an agent, or being an agent yourself, gives you a structural head start over the average buyer.

Nothing has changed in the rules yet, but the regulatory scrutiny is a sign that it might. If you are planning to buy at an upcoming new launch, go in with eyes open. Ask your agent directly how the preview process works and whether any units are being held back. If the rules do tighten, the experience for public buyers at new launches should eventually become considerably fairer.
items.headline_zh: 经纪抢先选购单位，condo VIP预览惯例遭监管机构审查
items.summary_zh: 监管机构正在审查新condo开售时的VIP预览销售惯例，房产经纪往往在公众买家有机会入场之前，已率先买入或预留单位。
items.meaning_zh: 如果你曾经赶到某个新楼盘开售现场，却发现心仪单位早已售罄，这正是背后的原因，而相关规定可能很快就会有所改变。
items.body_zh:
监管机构正在审查新condo开售时处理VIP预览的方式。这是业内由来已久的做法，房产经纪在公众买家进场之前，就能优先接触到单位。在许多开售活动中，经纪不仅会在预览期间带客户来看房，自己也会趁机购入单位，或早早预留最抢手的楼层和方位，让普通买家根本没有机会。

这种情况令公众买家不满已久。你兴冲冲地到新楼盘开售现场，对某个楼栋方向或楼层真的很感兴趣，却被告知那些单位早已售出。VIP预览制度实际上造成了双轨市场：认识经纪、或者本身就是经纪的人，比普通买家天生就有先机。

目前规定还没有任何改变，但监管机构的关注本身已经是一个信号。如果你计划在即将推出的新楼盘入市，请保持清醒。直接问你的经纪预览流程是怎么运作的，有没有单位被提前保留。一旦规定收紧，公众买家在新楼盘开售时的体验，应该会逐渐公平很多。

items.headline: HDB Resale Prices Hold Steady in June, Million-Dollar Flat Sales Hit a New Monthly Record
items.summary: HDB resale prices were broadly flat in June 2026, but the number of flats sold at $1 million or more hit a new monthly high, showing the top end of the market is still very active.
items.meaning: Overall HDB prices are not falling sharply month to month, but if you want a large flat in a sought-after area, crossing the million-dollar mark is increasingly the norm rather than the exception.
items.body:
HDB resale prices were broadly unchanged in June 2026, which on the surface sounds like a quiet month. But underneath that stability, the top end of the market was anything but calm. The number of HDB flats sold at $1 million or more reached a new monthly record, meaning more million-dollar transactions happened in June than in any previous month.

The two trends are not contradictory. Overall prices can hold steady while the upper segment pushes higher. Larger flats in mature, well-served towns are commanding premiums that buyers are clearly willing to pay, even as the broader market stays flat.

For buyers, the June data is a reminder that HDB is not one single market. A three-room flat in a less central town sits in a very different environment from a five-room in Bishan or Queenstown. Know which segment you are actually competing in, because what is happening at the million-dollar end tells you very little about pricing in the segment where you are actually shopping.
items.headline_zh: 6月HDB转售价格基本持稳，百万元成交量创单月新高
items.summary_zh: 2026年6月HDB转售组屋价格整体持平，但成交价达$1 million或以上的组屋数量创下单月新高，显示市场高端的交投依然相当活跃。
items.meaning_zh: 整体HDB价格并没有逐月大幅下跌，但如果你想买一个地段好、面积大的单位，破百万元已经越来越成为常态，而不是例外。
items.body_zh:
2026年6月HDB转售价格整体变化不大，表面上看似平静的一个月。但平静的表象之下，市场高端的交易却一点都不平淡。当月成交价达$1 million或以上的HDB组屋数量创下单月历史新高，即6月的百万元成交宗数超过了此前任何一个月。

这两个趋势并不矛盾。整体价格可以保持稳定，同时高端市场继续走高。成熟市镇、配套完善地区的大型单位正获得买家愿意支付的溢价，即便整体市场维持平稳。

对买家而言，6月的数据提醒我们：HDB并不是一个单一市场。较偏远市镇的三房式单位，和碧山或女皇镇的五房式单位，所处的市场环境截然不同。清楚自己真正在哪个细分市场竞争，因为百万元高端市场的动向，对你实际选购的价格区间来说，参考意义其实相当有限。
